label: Setup & Overview
name: SA Overview
title: SA Overview
content:
[{"id": "sa-ov-sp", "type": "spacer", "data": {"col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-head", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Setup & Overview", "col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-intro", "type": "paragraph", "data": {"text": "Start here to configure South African localisation—company defaults, VAT, payroll masters, COIDA, and tax templates. Use the shortcuts below or the workspace menu (top left) for day-to-day work: submissions, returns, payroll runs, and incidents.", "col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-h-ws", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "South African workspaces", "col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-p-ws", "type": "paragraph", "data": {"text": "Each workspace groups transactions, reports, and statutory tools for that area.

SA Payroll — EMP201/501, PAYE, UIF, SDL, statutory masters, rebates, salary processing, bank remittances, and payroll/accounting reports.

SA VAT — South Africa VAT settings, VAT201 and related returns, and guidance on item and document tax templates.

SA Labour — Skills development, workplace skills plans, annual training, business trips, SETA, and Employment Equity reporting.

SA COIDA — COIDA settings, annual returns, workplace injuries, and OID claims.", "col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-h-setup", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Configuration & setup", "col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-p-setup", "type": "paragraph", "data": {"text": "Open these documents once (or when policy changes), then work primarily in the workspaces above.", "col": 12}}, {"id": "sa-ov-c1", "type": "card", "data": {"card_name": "ZA setup", "col": 3}}, {"id": "sa-ov-c2", "type": "card", "data": {"card_name": "Payroll configuration", "col": 3}}, {"id": "sa-ov-c3", "type": "card", "data": {"card_name": "Labour setup", "col": 3}}, {"id": "sa-ov-c4", "type": "card", "data": {"card_name": "COIDA setup", "col": 3}}, {"id": "sa-ov-c5", "type": "card", "data": {"card_name": "Tax templates (ERPNext)", "col": 12}}]
